home.heroSubtitle: A growing suite of local-first tools for recording and media. Everything runs in your browser — no servers, no tracking, no logins.

load.title: Load
load.description: Static pages with no backend. Once cached, the tools run entirely in your browser.

process.title: Process
process.description: All data stays in your computer's RAM. Nothing is sent to a remote server or cloud storage.

save.title: Save
save.description: Download files only when you choose. Your media never leaves your device until you decide.

recordOnce.title: Record Once
recordOnce.description: Capture audio, video, or screen share with a studio-grade interface. Chunks buffer in RAM with a 5-minute safety cap to prevent out-of-memory errors.

screenToGif.title: Screen to GIF
screenToGif.description: Capture screen recordings and export them directly to optimized, high-fidelity animated GIFs. Custom frame rate and sizing options available.

exifStripper.title: EXIF Metadata Stripper
exifStripper.description: Remove hidden metadata from photos — GPS coordinates, camera model, timestamps, and more — before sharing online. All processing happens locally in your browser.

imageOptimizer.title: Image Optimizer
imageOptimizer.description: Resize, compress, and convert images to modern formats like WebP or AVIF. See before-and-after file sizes instantly — all processing runs on your device.

local.title: 100% Browser Local
local.description: Your files, recordings, and GIFs never touch a server. Everything is buffered and processed directly in your browser's memory.

privacy.title: Zero Tracking
privacy.description: No cookies, no database logging, no telemetry. We don't even know you're here.

offline.title: Offline-First
offline.description: Once loaded, you can run these tools completely offline. Perfect for sensitive content.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully transparent codebase. Inspect the code, verify the local-only execution yourself.

recorder.title: Record Once
recorder.subtitle: Record your camera, screen, or microphone completely offline. Save directly to your local drive.
recorder.permissionGateDesc: To start recording, we need permission to access your media devices. All capturing and processing runs locally in your browser.
recorder.maxDurationWarning: Note: Recording is stored in your computer's RAM. We recommend keeping clips under 5 minutes to prevent out-of-memory errors.
recorder.downloadReady: Recording completed. Your file is ready to download.
recorder.errorDevices: Failed to access media devices. Please verify permissions in your browser bar.

screenToGif.title: Screen to GIF
screenToGif.subtitle: Record your screen and convert it directly into an animated GIF. No servers, no uploads.
screenToGif.converting: Converting to GIF... This might take a few seconds.
screenToGif.gifCreatedDesc: Your animated GIF has been rendered in-memory and is ready for use.

exifStripper.title: EXIF Metadata Stripper
exifStripper.subtitle: Remove GPS, camera info, and timestamps from images before sharing. No servers, no uploads.
exifStripper.dropzoneHint: or click to browse — JPEG, PNG, WebP
exifStripper.noMetadata: No EXIF metadata detected in this image.
exifStripper.strippedDesc: Your image has been re-encoded without metadata and is ready to download.
exifStripper.privacyNote: Processed entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
exifStripper.fileSizeWarning: Large file detected. Processing may use significant memory.

errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
errors.processingFailed: Failed to process image. Please try another file.

imageOptimizer.title: Image Optimizer
imageOptimizer.subtitle: Resize, compress, and convert images to WebP or AVIF before sharing. No servers, no uploads.
imageOptimizer.dropzoneHint: or click to browse — JPEG, PNG, WebP, BMP
imageOptimizer.pngQualityNote: PNG uses lossless compression. Quality slider applies to JPEG, WebP, and AVIF only.
imageOptimizer.optimizedDesc: Your image has been compressed in-memory and is ready to download.
imageOptimizer.privacyNote: Processed entirely in your browser using local CPU/GPU. Nothing is uploaded.
imageOptimizer.fileSizeWarning: Large file detected. Processing may use significant memory.
imageOptimizer.avifUnsupported: Your browser cannot encode AVIF. Output will fall back to WebP.
imageOptimizer.avifFallbackNotice: AVIF is not supported in this browser. Saved as WebP instead.

errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or BMP.
errors.processingFailed: Failed to optimize image. Please try another file.
